meaning: vi.好色,纵欲n.肉欲,好色的人adj.好色的
examples: Lech Walesa and Nelson Mandela are numbered among my personal heroes.
Both became academic lawyers, Lech specialising in Labour law.
He was the less prominent of the twins: their all-but-identical appearance (Lech had a mole on his cheek; Jaroslaw did not) belied big differences.
During his tour of the United States last November, Lech Walesa underscored this point vividly.
One excuse is that President Lech Kaczynski vetoes laws put forward by a government he detests.
